TimeEntry.Title: Update GPO policy for password lockouts and update VPN documentation

TimeEntry.Title: Lesley cannot access brandywine-homes.com url
TimeEntry.Notes: DNS issue. Temporarily worked around it by updating hosts file. Will connect after hours to investigate the issue further. Simply refreshing/flushing DNS does not fix the issue.

TimeEntry.Title: Lesley cannot access brandywine-homes.com url

TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the TE-DC-SFOSBKP-01 server to check the firewall backup for BWH, copy backup files, and place them in the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Notes: While trying to upgrade the machine from Win 10 to Win 11, installation was getting failed due to low disk space on machine IMG-RE1 . So cleanup done in machine now the disk space has increased t

TimeEntry.Title: Brandywine Homes Windows 11 Upgrade
TimeEntry.Notes: According to the lead, the Windows upgrade failed due to a space issue, as only 20 GB of space was available. Following the lead's instructions, I connected to the computer IMG-RE1,

TimeEntry.Title: failed patch updated on machine BWWS024-PC
TimeEntry.Notes: Verified the patches after automatic deployment and found that high vulnerability patches had failed on the below machines. Connected to the machines, manually downloaded and installed the patches,

TimeEntry.Title: SERVER Alert - Attention - BWH-HQ-VBR-01: (10.1.1.35) - Memory Utilization is 78%, threshold value for this monitor is 75%
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the machine and connected to Ops Manager. Verified the alerts and checked the memory utilization; everything was found to  be normal. This issue has now been closed.
TimeEntry.Resource: A. Kumar Poddar CHD-TS1 Support - Remote
